title: DENTAL CARE REFERRAL - 211info
text: COLUMBIA RIVER HEALTH DENTAL CARE REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to access dental services through one of the community partners or through the dental van, which is periodically on site 450 Tatone Street Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 481-5444 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 481-5444 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm, Saturday 8am-noon Services: Dental Care Referrals Mobile Dental Care Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA RIVER HEALTH
